title: Temporary closure for fumigation
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The offices will be open on Friday 30 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - Community Development offices will close early today, at the latest 16:00, to allow for fumigation of the premises.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - Community Development offices will close early today, at the latest 16:00, to allow for fumigation of the premises."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The closure is necessary to ensure a safe and healthy working environment for staff and the public."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The offices will reopen at normal working hours from tomorrow, Friday, 30 January.","html":"The offices will reopen at normal working hours from tomorrow, Friday, 30 January."}]
bodyHtml: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The offices will be open on Friday 30 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - Community Development offices will close early today, at the latest 16:00, to allow for fumigation of the premises.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - Community Development offices will close early today, at the latest 16:00, to allow for fumigation of the premises."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The closure is necessary to ensure a safe and healthy working environment for staff and the public."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The offices will reopen at normal working hours from tomorrow, Friday, 30 January.","html":"The offices will reopen at normal working hours from tomorrow, Friday, 30 January."}]
teaser: The offices will be open on Friday 30 January.
featuredCaption: Photo for illustration purposes only. Photo: Unsplash
